Energy & Inputs.title: Will Crude Oil (CL) hit (HIGH) $200 by end of June?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Tail-risk bet (3% odds) on crude reach $200. Closes in ~1mo. Would lift farm diesel and pass through to nitrogen fertilizer cost within a few months.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (HIGH) $150 in May?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Tail-risk bet (1% odds) on crude reach $150. Closes in 15d. Would lift farm diesel and pass through to nitrogen fertilizer cost within a few months.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (HIGH) $110 in May?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Near coin-flip odds (58% YES) crude reach $110. Closes in 15d. Would lift farm diesel and pass through to nitrogen fertilizer cost within a few months.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (LOW) $70 in May?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Tail-risk bet (4% odds) on crude drop below $70. Closes in 15d. A move this low would ease diesel and nitrogen input cost pressure heading into side-dress and summer ops.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will Crude Oil (CL) hit (HIGH) $120 by end of June?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Near coin-flip odds (50% YES) crude reach $120. Closes in ~1mo. Would lift farm diesel and pass through to nitrogen fertilizer cost within a few months.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will Crude Oil (CL) hit (LOW) $70 by end of June?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Tail-risk bet (14% odds) on crude drop below $70. Closes in ~1mo. A move this low would ease diesel and nitrogen input cost pressure heading into side-dress and summer ops.
